case_title: SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION VS CARTER CATHY

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER CATHY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARTER CATHY $920.31 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $920.31, PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE EVERY 2 WEEKS, 2ND & 4TH THURSDAY OF EACH MO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,400.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER CATHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
MOTION OPPOSITION TO SET ASIDE TERMS OF JUDGMEN FILED BY DEFENDANT CARTER CATHY HEARING SET FOR JUL-31-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PARTIES AGREED THAT PAYMENT PLAN WILL REMAIN IN EFFECT.
